SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jun-13-2016 Discharged

SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Apr-25-2016 Discharged

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2016 Set For Trial On Mar-03-16 At 10:20 A.M. In Dept 220

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-03-2016 Continued To Mar-03-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-16-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Jean-Bernard Guerree's Appeal of the denial of the motion to vacate the small claims judgment is scheduled this day.
Appearances:
For the Plaintiff/Respondent For the Defendant/Appellant
Onward Partners: Katrina M. Saleen, Esq., (Self-represented) Jean-Bernard Guerree
Broderick Saleen Law Firm. One Market Plaza
2600 El Camino Real, Suite 506 Stewart Tower, 35th Floor
Palo Alto, CA 94306 San Francisco, CA 94015
(650) 857 9000 (415) 623 2016
e:mail: katrian.telfer@brodericklaw.com e-mail: jb@wic-group.com

10:30 AM: This matter comes on calendar being assigned from the Presiding Judge's Department for a Hearing on Appearl of the denial of the motion to vacate the small claims judgment.
Court, counsel and parties present.
Brief Opening Statements by counsel for Plaintiff.
Morris Phillips was sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff under direct examination by counsel Katrina Saleen. Plaintiff's Exhibit 1. Copy of Proof of Service filed 11/2/15 was admitted in Evidence.
11:00 AM: Plaintiff Jeff Loomis was sworn and examined under direct examination by attorney Katriana M. Saleen.
The following Plaintiff's Exhibits were admitted in Evidence:
Exhibit 2. Four page document Proposal for Avise Partners
Exhibit 3. Three page document dated 12/30/15
Exhibit 4. E-mail chain dated 7/6 from Mr. Guerree to Mr. Loomis
Exhibit 5. E-mail chain dated 7/18/15 from Stephanie Empart
11:35 AM: Quentin Cotillard was sworn and examined under direct examination by attorney Katrina M. Saleen.
The following Plaintiff's Exhibits were admitted in Evidence:
Exhibit 6. E-mail chain dated 8/12/15 from Mr. Guerree to Mr. Cotillard
Exhibit 7. E-mail chain dated 6/25 from Stephanie Empart to Mr. Cotillard
11:30 AM: Plaintiff rests.
11:31 AM: Defendant/Appellant Jean-Bernard Guerree was sworn and examined on his own behalf. The Court allows Mr. Guerree to testify in a narrative form.
Defendant's Exhibit A. E-mail dated February 25, 2016 from San Francisco One Market to Jean-Bernard Guerree is admitted in Evidence this day.
Court and counsel for Plaintiff examined Mr. Guerree.
Defendant rests.
Court ordered the matter under submission. On order of the Court the clerk will give add the official address for the Defendant Mr. Guerree as printed in his business card at WIC Group
Jean-Bernard Guerre, President and CEO, One Market Street, Suite 3600 San Francisco, CA 94105.

Court ordered Original trial exhibits returned to respective parties. Court will keep the copies that were submitted.

12:13 AM: Court adjourned.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-29-2016 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-02-2015 Judgment Entered
